content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical datasheet for a "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030". It contains: - Title and product name. - A graph showing "Typical L vs Frequency". - A diagram showing the physical dimensions and terminal configuration. - A table listing "Recommended Land Pattern" with dimensions for various part numbers. - Contact information for Coilcraft in different regions (US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore). - A footer with the Coilcraft logo and document details. **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** "HIGH TEMPERATURE", "Document 863-2" * **Title:** "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030" * **Sub-title:** "Typical L vs Frequency" * **Logos:** RoHS/REACH, Halogen Free, AEC Q200 +125°C * **Graph:** * Y-axis: Inductance (µH) * X-axis: Frequency (MHz) * Curves: Various inductance values (10 µH, 8.2 µH, 6.8 µH, 5.6 µH, 4.7 µH, 3.3 µH, 2.7 µH, 2.2 µH, 1.5 µH, 1.0 µH, 0.60 µH, 0.30 µH, 0.16 µH) * **Diagram:** * Shows the component with dimensions like 0.295 ±0.020 (7.5 ±0.5). * Indicates terminal direction. * Shows recommended land pattern dimensions (0.122 max, 0.236 typ). * **Table:** * Columns: Dash number, Terminal width (in / mm), Land pattern width (in / mm). * Rows: Various part numbers (-161, -301, -601, etc.) with corresponding dimensions. * **Footer:** * Coilcraft logo. * Contact info for US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore. * Document number and revision date. **3. Construct the JSON:** * Start with the main title and product info. * Include the graph data as a description since exact values are hard to extract precisely from a visual graph. * Describe the diagram and its key dimensions. * Transcribe the table data accurately. * Include the footer information. **Drafting the JSON:** ```json [{"bbox": [93, 11, 365, 70], "category": "header", "text": "HIGH TEMPERATURE"}, {"bbox": [776, 9, 915, 26], "category": "header", "text": "Document 863-2"}, {"bbox": [19, 78, 68, 135], "category": "logo", "text": "RoHS/REACH COMPLIANT"}, {"bbox": [85, 82, 586, 113], "category": "title", "text": "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030"}, {"bbox": [85, 122, 315, 146], "category": "title", "text": "Typical L vs Frequency"}, {"bbox": [19, 142, 68, 201], "category": "logo", "text": "Halogen Free"}, {"bbox": [19, 208, 68, 266], "category": "logo", "text": "AEC Q200 +125°C"}, {"bbox": [85, 150, 485, 389], "category": "graph", "text": "Graph showing Inductance (µH) vs Frequency (MHz). Y-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 µH. X-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 MHz. Curves represent inductance values of 10 µH, 8.2 µH, 6.8 µH, 5.6 µH, 4.7 µH, 3.3 µH, 2.7 µH, 2.2 µH, 1.5 µH, 1.0 µH, 0.60 µH, 0.30 µH, and 0.16 µH."}, {"bbox": [514, 122, 796, 269], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing the component with dimensions 0.295 ±0.020 (7.5 ±0.5). Indicates direction of terminals and start (short) lead. Connect high dv/dt here for lowest EMI."}, {"bbox": [519, 277, 692, 362], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. 0.123 ±0.010 (3.12 ±0.25)."}, {"bbox": [724, 268, 912, 341], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. 0.122 max (3.1), 0.236 typ (6.0)."}, {"bbox": [514, 367, 677, 499], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. 0.116 (2.94), 0.256 (6.50)."}, {"bbox": [521, 504, 635, 533], "category": "title", "text": "Recommended Land Pattern"}, {"bbox": [791, 515, 912, 534], "category": "text", "text": "Dimensions are in inches mm"}, {"bbox": [521, 544, 746, 710], "category": "table", "text": "
Dash numberTerminal width ±0.004 / ±0,10 (in / mm)Land pattern width (in / mm)

"}, {"bbox": [86, 919, 279, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Coilcraft"}, {"bbox": [149, 965, 275, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "www.coilcraft.com"}, {"bbox": [329, 917, 642, 979], "category": "footer", "text": "US +1-847-639-6400 sales@coilcraft.com\nUK +44-1236-730595 sales@coilcraft-europe.com\nTaiwan +886-2-2264 3646 sales@coilcraft.com.tw\nChina +86-21-6218 8074 sales@coilcraft.com.cn\nSingapore + 65-6484 8412 sales@coilcraft.com.sg"}, {"bbox": [696, 917, 915, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "Document 863-2 Revised 12/16/25\n© Coilcraft Inc. 2025\nThis product may not be used in medical or high risk applications without prior Coilcraft approval.\nSpecification subject to change without notice.\nPlease check web site for latest information."}] ```
